title: OIDC Relying Party Partner Configuration
description: Configuration for an OpenID Connect Relying Party partner.

name.description: Name of the OIDC Relying Party partner.

client_id.description: The ID that identifies this client to the provider.

client_secret.description: The secret associated with the client ID. Do not include if creating a public client.

verification_keystore.description: When signature algorithm requires a certificate, the keystore which contains the selected certificate to perform the signing.

verification_key_alias.description: When signature algorithm requires a certificate, the alias of the public key in the selected keystore to use in signature verification.

jwks_endpoint_url.description: When signature algorithm requires a certificate, the JWK endpoint of the provider. If a metadata endpoint is specified in BasicConfigurationData, the JWK URL will be read from metadata information. Cannot be specified if using a signingKeyLabel.

key_management_algorithm.description: The key management algorithm to use.

content_encryption_algorithm.description: The content encryption algorithm to use.

decryption_keystore.description: When key management algorithm requires a certificate, the keystore which contains the selected certificate to perform JWT decryption.

decryption_key_alias.description: When key management algorithm requires a certificate, the alias of the private key in the selected keystore to perform JWT decryption.

scope.description: An array of strings that identify the scopes to request from the provider. Defaults to ['openid'].

perform_user_info.description: A setting that specifies whether to perform user info request automatically whenever possible.
